description: Install or update Parallel Wave Orchestration module config and help entries (additive, non-destructive).
args: {-H: headless mode}|{inline values: skip prompts with provided values}

description: Empirically probe what the parallel-build harness allows (the harness Facts: F1-F5); the REQUIRED first step.
args: {dep: a native dep to probe}|{copies: probes per fact, default 2}
outputs: harness-profile artifact (clean | partial | broken per Fact)

description: Turn epics + architecture into a safe parallelization playbook: applicability gate, adversarial DAG, waves, Phase 0 spec, per-lane cards.
Implement AND prove the Phase-0 guard-rails on main before wave 1 (migration-set guard proven RED, seams, .gitattributes, pre-provisioned deps, test-ids split).
outputs: Phase 0 infra on main (guard proven RED) + receipt

description: Execute ONE parallel wave end-to-end keeping main green: emulate create/dev, gate, top-level review, serial integration, smoke, handoff. Invoked once per wave.
outputs: wave merged on main (green) + Field Note + next-wave handoff prompt

description: Close out a finished backlog: final E2E smoke campaign by user-journey, a de-parallelized consolidation wave, and the method+skills maturation report.
outputs: E2E verdicts + consolidated main + maturation report

description: Smoke a rendered screen/journey against its mockup and return a verdict. On-call leaf delegated by S3 (end-of-screen-wave) and S4 (final E2E).
outputs: UI smoke verdict (StructuredOutput: PASS/FAIL + deltas vs mockup + figures)
